children.text: When driving in a vehicle equipped with airbags, it is best to place your ______on the steering wheel.
left hand at the 8 o'clock and right hand at the 4 o'clock position
left hand at the 10 o'clock position and right hand at the 3 o'clock position
left hand at the 9 o'clock position and right hand at the 2 o'clock position
left hand at the 10 o'clock position and right hand at the 2 o'clock position
